name: OpenClaw
description: « A locally hosted open-source personal AI assistant (Mac/Windows/Linux) with persistent memory and full system access. Control it via WhatsApp, Telegram, Discord, Slack, iMessage, or Signal to automate your workflows

name: AI Video Enhancer Online
description: « Enhance video clarity, reduce noise, and upscale resolution up to 4K with specialized AI models. Free to try, no installation required

name: HumanFlow
description: « An AI assistant dedicated to recruitment that helps sort resumes, analyze profiles, and prioritize the best talent more quickly. This co-pilot facilitates decision-making by reducing the time spent on CVs while providing a clear overview of candidates

name: FalcoCut
description: « A powerful AI platform dedicated to automated video marketing creation from text, images, or voice. Generate talking avatars, clone voices, translate your videos, and adapt formats for social media (UGC, e-commerce video, etc.)

name: Waypoint-1 Overworld
description: « An open-source model that simulates interactive worlds in real time and can be controlled via text, mouse, and keyboard. This AI simulator can run on a consumer gaming PC

name: Image Translate AI
description: « Instantly translate text from an image while preserving the original layout. Compatible with over 130 languages for your documents, screenshots, or marketing visuals. The tool also offers batch translation

name: Nemovideo
description: « Create viral videos in minutes by following simple instructions or importing your content. You can generate clips tailored for social media with subtitles, music, transitions, and automatic editing based on current trends

name: Weshop AI
description: « A comprehensive creative studio dedicated to e-commerce that offers virtual fitting, face swapping, AI mannequin generation, and product recoloring services. The platform also includes tools for changing backgrounds and adjusting poses

name: AnyToURL
description: « This AI instantly turns any file into a shareable link. Drag and drop to host images and PDFs with previews and fast global CDN. Fast, easy, and secure

name: Diagrimo
description: « Organize your ideas into clear visuals by converting text into diagrams, infographics, or flowcharts that are ready to present. A variety of templates and editing tools allow you to easily adjust colors, shapes, and structure

name: CreateWAlink
description: « Create direct links in seconds that open a WhatsApp conversation without saving a contact, with the option to add a pre-filled message. The service also provides a downloadable QR code to easily integrate this link into your printed materials or web pages

name: GLM 4.7 Flash
description: « A lightweight model created by Z.AI that achieves open-source SOTA among models of similar size. Optimized for agentic coding with a “think before you act” mechanism, the model also excels at Chinese writing, translation, and long texts

name: Syllaby.io
description: « Create faceless videos with AI avatars and voices. This AI can write the script and generate a complete video from a simple idea. You can then schedule publication on multiple social networks from an integrated calendar
